Bash("/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/17/bin/psql.exe" postgresql://postgres:ljh04021@localhost:5432/intendex_dev -t -A -F'|' -c "SELECT id, company, category, array_to_string\(keywords,','\) as keywords, \\"siteUrl\\", \\"siteDescription\\" FROM advertisers ORDER BY category, company;" 2>&1)
